title: Crosses Everywhere!
description: Basically adds various crosses and banner types to the game
body:
As the name of the mod says, this mod is all about crosses! In the game you'll be able to craft 4 main types of crosses:

- Latin crosses
- Standing Latin crosses
- Orthodox crosses
- Standing Orthodox crosses         

Each type of the cross has 11 variants _(12 for version 26.1 and above [mod version 1.1.0])_! That means you can make a cross from any type of the wood you want! It's super simple. You just need 5 sticks (or 5 bamboos if you want to make a bamboo one, but you also can use sticks) and 4x tree sap from the wood you want to use. But now's the question. How to get tree sap? It's simple! Right-click on a log while using an axe! It also can drop from leaves. There's also one special cross: Jerusalem Cross! It can be made by using 5 dark oak planks and 4 gold ingots. Is that everything? Of course not! This mod also adds many banner patterns! And no, you don't have to unlock them. They're available in the loom from the start! For now the mod is has 2 language options:

- English
- Polish




**_Heil Christ!_**
